texto: We have created a mindset in our society where everyone wants what they want when they want it. And if we don't get what we want when we want it, we feel ripped off. To make matters worse, we intensify our problems by continuously rehashing our woe-is-me story to the entire world. Whatever it is that has the potential to keep you from enjoying the day, understand that it's not the situation itself that is causing you to be unhappy. It's your thoughts and how you allow them to control you. It's what you choose to focus on that fuels your emotions and defines your reality.
explicacao: Citação de Steve Rizzo sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “We have created a mindset in our society where everyone wants what they want when they want it. A…” articula felicidade, happiness, vida em registro de felicidade, com relevância para contextos como vida e mind.
